settings.title: Design & Planning
settings.subtitle: Kitchen Layout • Workflow • Budgeting
settings.description: We start with a comprehensive analysis of your space. Our experts create optimized kitchen layouts that maximize workflow efficiency while strictly adhering to your budgetary requirements.

settings.title: Consult & Select Right Products
settings.subtitle: Expert Guidance • Custom Solutions
settings.description: Navigate our extensive catalog with expert guidance. We help you select the perfect commercial-grade equipment tailored to your specific menu, volume, and operational needs.

settings.title: Best Pricing & Order Placement
settings.subtitle: Competitive Pricing • Bulk Sourcing
settings.description: Leverage our industry relationships and bulk sourcing capabilities. We ensure you get the most competitive pricing on top-tier restaurant equipment.

settings.title: Equipment Delivery
settings.subtitle: (On Schedule)
settings.description: Time is money. We coordinate precise, on-schedule deliveries to your location, ensuring your equipment arrives safely and exactly when your project timeline demands it.

settings.title: Installation & Setup
settings.subtitle: Professional Installation & Testing
settings.description: Our certified professionals handle the heavy lifting. We provide complete installation, calibration, and rigorous testing of all equipment to ensure peak performance from day one.

settings.title: Final Inspection & Approvals
settings.subtitle: Compliance • Health • Fire Safety
settings.description: We stand by you through the red tape. Our team assists with final compliance checks, ensuring your kitchen meets all health, safety, and fire department regulations.

settings.title: Grand Opening & Serving Customers
settings.subtitle: Your Kitchen is Ready to Serve!
settings.description: The moment of truth. With a fully equipped, optimized, and approved kitchen, you are ready to open your doors and celebrate your success.

settings.title: Quality Products
settings.description: We source only top-tier, commercial-grade equipment built to withstand the rigorous demands of a professional kitchen environment.

settings.title: On-Time Delivery
settings.description: Your opening schedule is our priority. We coordinate logistics meticulously to ensure your equipment arrives exactly when needed.

settings.title: Best Pricing
settings.description: Through our extensive network and bulk purchasing power, we secure the most competitive rates in the industry for your project.

settings.title: Full Project Support
settings.description: From the first blueprint to the final health inspection, you have a dedicated team of experts ensuring your success.

settings.hero_subtitle: We guide restaurant owners through every step — from initial design and equipment selection to installation, inspection, and your grand opening day.
settings.timeline_subtitle: From concept to grand opening, we walk with you through every critical phase of building your restaurant.
settings.cta_title: Ready to Build Your Dream Kitchen?
settings.cta_text: Let our team of experts guide you from the very first blueprint to your grand opening day. Your success is our mission.
